creator: m_josenhans@web.de
text:
I do not know the state of hipe for ARM architecture. Some time ago it was broken as far as I rememeber. Default for ARM is also beam-VM as I heared last week.

I do not consider it a good idea, to change the VM-by package upgrade. If there is a different VM-behaviour, then it might affect many running servers. Even, if it only the memory footprint changed or some performance issue. 

Thus in my opion, Hipe needs to be a different package. Same as in Debian.
